title: Narrative Annotation File (v0.1 pure-JSON profile)
description: Machine-checkable encoding of the PURE-JSON profile for one stimulus (small/demo files and tests). The AUTHORITATIVE format spec is docs/design/ANNOTATION_FORMAT.md (v0.2), which makes HDF5 the canonical container for production with this JSON as a readable sidecar manifest; dense channels are then offloaded to a sibling .h5 referenced by 'data_ref'. Inapplicable features use null/NaN. This schema validates the inline-value JSON layout that matlab/readAnnotations.m reads today.

timeline.description: Common time grid all features are resampled onto. time_sec[i] = t_start_sec + i / rate_hz.

time_sec.description: Optional explicit timestamps; derivable from rate if omitted.

features.description: Top-level feature classes mirroring docs/scoping_review hierarchy.

human_annotations.description: Reserved for later human annotations. Same hierarchical shape as 'features'; empty in machine-generated files.

featureGroup.description: A node in the hierarchy: either further subgroups or leaf feature channels.

value.description: Length-n_samples array. Scalars: number|null. Vectors/categoricals: array per timepoint or label string. null === NaN === not measured at that timepoint.

data_ref.description: Optional path into a sibling binary file when 'value' is offloaded.

categories.description: Label vocabulary for categorical channels (index = code).

applicable.description: false when this feature does not apply to the stimulus modality; value is all-null.

resample.description: How native-rate samples were mapped to the grid (mean|max|nearest|sum|mode|...).
